title: Salty Air-Fried Light Coriander Seeds Crumble
description: A light and crispy snack dish featuring salty air-fried coriander seeds, perfect for a monsoon season in Jamaica.

ingredients.name: coconut oil or melted coconut cream

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the light coriander seeds with a pinch of salt.
Add coconut oil or melted coconut cream and mix until well combined. The mixture should be moist but not wet.
Gradually stir in flour while continuing to mix until a crumbly consistency is achieved.
Spoon out generous portions of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, making sure to space them apart for even cooking.
Air fry at 200°C (392°F) for about 10-15 minutes or until golden and crispy. Rotate halfway through for even heating.
Remove from air fryer and allow to cool slightly before serving.
